understanding.goal_understanding: Reach the goal gem tile marked `+` by navigating the grid while avoiding spikes, using horizontal moves combined with gravity fall and removing breakable blocks via clicks when needed.
understanding.mechanics_understanding: MOVE_LEFT/RIGHT shifts x then auto-falls along gravity (DOWN: toward lower y) until landing on a solid tile; CLICK removes an `x` block at the given coordinate without advancing the platform timer; landing on `u`/`v` spikes ends the run; each action costs 1 step from the 50-turn budget; gravity direction determines fall vector after every horizontal hop.
